no: [Tiax for BG2 placeholder] Xan for BG2 More of the defeatist-sounding voiceovers from the LN Male Elf Mage (Enchanter).

conflicts.reason: CDTweaks romance cheats create stutter for mod NPCs
Choose one Xan in BG2. Standalone Xan (by Kulyok) is vastly more feature-rich with full romance and personal quests. BG1NPCinSoA auto-skips its Xan if standalone detected.
conflicts.source: BG1NPCinSoA tp2 REQUIRE_PREDICATE NOT FILE_EXISTS_IN_GAME O#Xan09.cre, 2026-03

conflicts.reason: Choose one Xan class change. NPC_EE #482-484 provides in-game class choices. Standalone Xan mod has install-time class components (F/M, Mage, Sorcerer, Wild Mage). Use standalone Xan's class choices for the dedicated Xan experience — much richer content.
conflicts.source: Component-level conflict. NPC_EE provides runtime choice; Xan standalone provides install-time with integrated content. Use standalone Xan for full experience, 2026-03

conflicts.reason: Both add Xan to BG2 via pdialog.2da/interdia.2da APPEND. Cannot have two Xan entries. Choose one: Continuous NPCs (lightweight continuation) or Xan NPC (full NPC with dialogue/quests)
conflicts.theirComps: #900 Add Xan to SoD and BG2

sum: Continues Xan's story into BG2/ToB as a joinable NPC with a full romance, extensive banters, and personal quests. One of the most popular NPC mods.
